examples.name: Basic output with interfaces across two VRFs
examples.input:
Interface                 VRF-Name                        VRF-ID  Site-of-Origin
loopback0                 default                              1  --
Null0                     default                              1  --
Ethernet1/1               default                              1  --
Ethernet1/2               default                              1  --
mgmt0                     management                           2  --

examples.name: Output with many interfaces across multiple VRFs
examples.input:
Interface                 VRF-Name                        VRF-ID  Site-of-Origin
Vlan6001                  ADMIN                                6  --
Vlan6700                  ADMIN                                6  --
Vlan5302                  AXNET                                7  --
Vlan7202                  AXNET                                7  --
Vlan6302                  AXNET                                7  --
Vlan5301                  MARKING                              4  --
Vlan7201                  MARKING                              4  --
Vlan6301                  MARKING                              4  --
Ethernet1/10              Keepalive                            3  --
Vlan1                     default                              1  --
Vlan100                   default                              1  --
loopback0                 default                              1  --
loopback1                 default                              1  --
Ethernet1/25              default                              1  --
Ethernet1/30              default                              1  --
Ethernet1/17              default                              1  --
Ethernet1/42              default                              1  --
mgmt0                     management                           2  --
